name: codex
description: Use OpenAI Codex from inside Google Antigravity to review code or delegate tasks. Adds /codex:review, /codex:adversarial-review, /codex:rescue, /codex:setup, /codex:status, /codex:result and /codex:cancel — the Antigravity (agy / Gemini) agent shells out to the local `codex` CLI (`codex exec`).
